title: Workorders and waiting-list right panel providers
goal: Register module-owned providers for workorders and waiting-list entries.
requirements: Workorders provider must use source_code=workorders and object_type=workorder.
Waiting-list provider must use source_code=waiting_list and object_type=waiting_list_entry.
Both providers support only mode=view in MVP.
Both providers must check domain access before returning a descriptor.
Providers must build htmx_url through reverse(), not string concatenation where avoidable.
Waiting-list detail partial must publish safe data-ai-context selection if it does not already.
Do not duplicate detail rendering logic; reuse existing views/partials.
acceptance: User without waiting-list access is denied.
